title: Suki 10048 Comfort Blanket Bing Giraffe Approx. 43.8 cm Brown
availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Baby Bing Bing Giraffe Blankie
soft boa plush Blankie with embroidered accents
Giraffe print in two tone beige
description: Product Description Beautiful supersoft plush Bing Bing Giraffe Babys Blankie / comforter from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Premium quality animal style print soft boa plush Giraffe in two colour beige with embroidered accents to the face. Approximately 17 ¼ inches / 43.8cm long. Suitable for Newborns+. Other items also available in the Bing Bing Giraffe and Zooma Zebra range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Bing Bing Giraffe soft boa plush babys Blankie
